title: Payload day click on calendar doesn't contain what day was clicked
description: Calendar select event fires with year/month/day/date but payload-delegate.ts didn't forward these coords to the CLI, and resolveToken didn't look up coords by field name. CLI received zeros.
resolution: Three-layer fix: (1) payload-delegate.ts forwards year/month/day/date coords, (2) resolveToken uses field-name-based coord lookup via ctx.coords[fieldName], (3) CLI collects all flags into coords map.
